_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

assumptions: All prices are based on current builder/resale market rates as of Q3 2026.
GST is 0% for ready-to-move projects with Completion Certificate (CC).
Stamp duty and registration charges are subject to UP Government circular rates at time of registry.

payment_plan.notes: For resale units, timeline adjusts based on home loan disbursement and NOC clearances.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Ivy County is the premier luxury wealth-preservation asset in Central Noida because it delivers uncompromising construction quality, flawless legal compliance, and an exclusive, low-density community.
why_buy: Impeccable Delivery Pedigree: Builder consistently delivers exactly what is rendered — zero compromise on material quality or finish.
Absolute Title Security: 100% physically complete and legally clear — immediate, stress-free registry execution.
Exclusive Low-Density: Limited towers ensure premium privacy and uncrowded amenities unlike neighboring mega-townships.
why_avoid: Capped Profit Potential: Extremely high entry price leaves very little room for future capital growth or quick flipping.
Heavy Upkeep Costs: Sustaining signature vertical gardens results in massive monthly maintenance bills.
Car Dependent: Project is tucked inside the sector — not a quick walk to metro or main road retail.
decision_profile.best_for: Wealthy end-users, HNI families, NRIs seeking zero legal stress and immediate luxury living.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Cash-flow investors, short-term flippers, or buyers with budgets under Rs 2.5 Cr.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: Internal notes about this project's recommendation.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Absolute best property for a wealthy family wanting zero daily stress. Some sellers ask for cash above registry value — advise buyer to not cross safe limits.

buyerPersonas.headline: Luxury and Prestige First
reasons: Low-density exclusive towers with private lobbies and vertical garden views.
CC/OC received — zero construction or legal risk.

buyerPersonas.headline: Hassle-Free Remote Purchase
reasons: Builder has zero-delay track record, clean documentation, and active registries.
Ready to occupy immediately — no construction monitoring required.

buyerPersonas.headline: Wealth Preservation Play
reasons: Stable 5-7% annual appreciation in a mature Central Noida micro-market.
Low density and premium brand command durable resale premiums.

riskRadar.description: Project fully delivered with Completion Certificate. Zero construction risk.
RERA registered, CC/OC received, registries active. Clean chain of title.
Premium sector with steady demand from HNI buyer pool. Fast exit possible.
Signature vertical gardens require high maintenance — expect above-average monthly charges.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: No NCLT proceedings. Builder financially stable.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Driven by premium branding, low density, and sector maturity. Not a high-alpha market.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Strong demand from IT corridor executives. Premium units command Rs 60,000 - Rs 90,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Strong demand in Sector 75 from HNI and NRI segment. Limited ready supply.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Easy exit options. Motivated sellers can move units within 30-45 days in this micro-market.

location_highlights.title: Spectrum Metro Mall
location_highlights.description: Premium retail, dining, and multiplex at doorstep.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Eco-Luxury Corridor
neighborhood_advantages.description: Sector 75 is Noida's emerging high-end residential hub with premium branded projects.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Excellent Road Network
neighborhood_advantages.description: Direct access to FNG Expressway and Noida-Greater Noida Expressway.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Upgrade buyers from older Noida sectors (Sector 50, 51, 62) moving to a premium ready product with better amenities, legal clarity, and a higher social address.
persona_descriptions.FAMILY: Established nuclear families with 2+ children who want a clean, car-free, luxury living environment with top-tier schools and hospitals within 5 km.
persona_descriptions.NRI: NRI buyers from UAE, UK, USA seeking a premium ready-to-register asset with a trusted builder and a hassle-free remote purchase experience. Prioritize zero construction risk.
persona_descriptions.PROFESSIONAL: Senior executives and C-suite professionals working in Noida Sector 62/63 or Sector 125-142 who value proximity to work and premium lifestyle.
persona_descriptions.INVESTOR: Wealth preservation investors seeking long-term capital appreciation in a mature, premium micro-market. Not a yield-first play.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative — prefers delivered, legally clean assets
persona_profile.family_stage: Established family or high-income nuclear couple
persona_profile.work_location: Sector 62/63 IT Hub or Sector 125-142 Corporate Hub
persona_profile.motivation_note: Status symbol and premium lifestyle. Not a yield play. Buyers prioritize address prestige, builder brand, and zero operational risk.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: The absolute safest and most beautiful ready-to-move luxury home in Central Noida. Ivy County delivers zero-compromise construction quality with a builder who has never missed a delivery date.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Best-in-class RTM luxury for families demanding zero operational risk. Immediate registry, immediate possession, immediate luxury.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Wealth preservation play. Expect steady 5-7% annual appreciation. Not a flipping asset — buy to hold for 7-10 years.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional for families. Huge landscaped parks, clean air, low density, secured gated community, and proximity to top schools within 4-5 km.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Low rental yield (2.8-3.1%) but rock-solid capital preservation. Premium demand from HNI buyers ensures fast exit when needed. Hold 5-10 years.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Defines the luxury benchmark for Sector 75. County Group never compromises on specification — Italian marble, high-speed lifts, and signature vertical gardens.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Lowest-risk luxury asset in Central Noida. Clean title, zero structural disputes, CC/OC received, no NCLT proceedings. Only risk is sustained maintenance costs.
walk_away_conditions: Budget under Rs 2.5 Cr — entry is uncompromising at this price tier.
Require immediate walking-distance transit — vehicular dependence is inherent to this sector.
Executing high-yield or short-term flipping — capital values have plateaued and rental yield is low.
negotiation_leverage: Builder-held inventory is limited — use long-pending resale listings as leverage.
Highlight high maintenance cost of vertical gardens to negotiate price down with motivated sellers.
Benchmark against Mahagun Mirabella which offers lower entry with slightly lesser spec.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ready to move immediately. No construction risk whatsoever. Act now if a registered unit is available below Rs 15,000/sqft super area.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Internal notes about this recommendation — do not expose to users.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Better landscaping and builder quality. Vertical gardens are a unique differentiator. County Group has zero-delay delivery track record.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Lower price per sqft and striking Roman architecture with larger balconies.
competitors.verdict: Ivy County wins on build quality, prestige, and legal safety. Mahagun wins on price and architectural aesthetics.
competitors.price_delta_note: Ivy County is Rs 1,000-1,500/sqft more expensive than Mahagun Mirabella.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Immediate possession and premium private-builder finish vs government-grade specifications.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Larger carpet area ratios and PSU sovereign safety (NBCC is a Government of India enterprise).
competitors.verdict: NBCC wins on unit size and sovereign safety; Ivy County wins on immediate possession, lifestyle, and finish quality.
competitors.price_delta_note: NBCC is priced roughly at par — comparable sqft rates with better carpet efficiency.
